response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical depth and leadership at scale (Staff at Stripe, millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic), the resume shows virtually no evidence of expertise in the core domain: experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, metrics/telemetry systems, or statistical analysis. At Principal level, this role demands immediate impact in building experimentation frameworks and measurement systems across teams—areas where significant ramp-up would be required despite strong engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Deep technical breadth and production scale experience handling millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic and millions of transactions at Shopify
Proven Principal-level leadership maturity with multiple Staff/Senior roles, mentorship, and open-source framework contributions
Strong systems architecture and infrastructure expertise across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps domains
concerns: No demonstrated experience with A/B testing platforms, feature flagging systems, or experimentation infrastructure
Absent expertise in metrics/telemetry systems, data analysis, experimental design, or statistical methods critical to the role
Python not listed in skills despite being a required language; no evidence of data science collaboration or analytical work

key_factors.factor: Technical leadership and production scale experience
